name: Bismuth Mace
setBonus: 2 of Set: While in The Pirates' Skyhold or Dread Sanctum, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 3s in combat, you will gain a stack of Prismatic Force. Each stack of Prismatic Force will grant the following bonuses: General: +0.35% Power. DPS: +0.5% Critical Severity. Healer: +0.4% Overall Outgoing Healing. Tank: +0.4% Awareness. Max 10 stacks.

name: Bloodbrass Mace
setBonus: 2 of Set: While in The Pirates' Skyhold, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 3s in combat, you will gain a stack of Freebooter's Will. Each stack of Freebooter's Will grants the following bonuses: General: +0.25% Power. DPS: +0.35% Critical Severity. Healer: +0.3% Overall Outgoing Healing. Tank: +0.3% Awareness. Max 10 stacks.

name: Prismatic Luminstep Sabatons — Ruthless Resources

equipBonuses.name: Ruthless Resources (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 5% faster Divinity/Performance/Soulweave regeneration for 15 seconds. (Max stack 5)

notes: Reinforced: Empty. Min Level 20. Set bonus: Completing this collection will give you an additional bonus of 30.

equipBonuses.name: Resourceful Forte (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: Your Divinity/Performance/Soulweave maximum increases by 20%. Gain 3.5% Forte.

equipBonuses.name: Healer's Influence (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: Healing an ally with an Encounter power also heals you for 80,000 and grants you and close Allies 3% Defense for 5s.

equipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Restoration (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 0.8% Outgoing Healing and Critical Strike. Max Stacks: 5

equipBonuses.name: Enduring Resilience (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: Gain up to 5% Control Resistance and -2.5% Incoming Damage based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health. Currently: 0% Control Resistance and -0% Incoming Damage.

equipBonuses.name: Reckless Remedy (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy gain a stack of Reckless Remedy, increasing your Defense by 1% but decreasing your Critical Severity by 2% for 5 seconds. (Max stack 5)

equipBonuses.name: Sudden Defense (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Deflect Severity by 11% and Forte by 7% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Warden's Reflexes (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: When you use an encounter power, you have a 30% chance to gain 8% Awareness for 6 seconds.
